[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / push

# Method: push()

```ts
push(): void;
```

Save the current rendering state to the state stack.
Use with [pop](pop.md) to isolate style changes within a block.

## Returns

`void`

## Example
